title: Glomera ambricaulis
taxonomy: Glomera ambricaulis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Glomera ambricaulis is classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Glomera is part of the tribe Malaxideae. This classification is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics.
